project.description: HRMS Deployment Job - Deploys application to production/staging environment

hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: IMAGE_TAG
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: Docker image tag to deploy (e.g. latest or build number)

hudson.tasks.Shell.command:
#!/bin/bash set -e
echo "======================================" echo "HRMS Deployment Job" echo "======================================" echo "Environment: ${ENVIRONMENT}" echo "Image Tag: ${IMAGE_TAG}" echo "Run Migrations: ${RUN_MIGRATIONS}" echo ""
# Confirmation for production if [ "${ENVIRONMENT}" = "production" ]; then echo "⚠️ WARNING: Deploying to PRODUCTION" echo "This will affect production users!" sleep 5 fi
# Pre-deployment backup echo "Step 1: Creating database backup..." BACKUP_DIR="./backups" mkdir -p ${BACKUP_DIR} BACKUP_FILE="${BACKUP_DIR}/hrms_db_backup_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S).sql"
docker exec hrms_db mysqldump -h localhost -uhrms_user -phrms_pass hrms_db > ${BACKUP_FILE} || echo "Backup skipped" echo "✓ Backup created: ${BACKUP_FILE}"
echo "" echo "Step 2: Stopping current containers..." docker-compose -f docker-compose.yml down --remove-orphans || echo "No containers to stop" sleep 5
echo "" echo "Step 3: Pulling latest images..." docker pull mysql:8.0 || echo "MySQL image already available" docker pull phpmyadmin:5 || echo "PHPMyAdmin image already available"
echo "" echo "Step 4: Starting new containers with image tag: hrms-app:${IMAGE_TAG}..." docker-compose -f docker-compose.yml up -d
echo "" echo "Step 5: Waiting for services to be healthy..." sleep 30
# Health checks echo "Step 6: Running health checks..." MAX_ATTEMPTS=10 ATTEMPT=0
while [ $ATTEMPT -lt $MAX_ATTEMPTS ]; do if curl -f http://localhost:8080 >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "✓ Web service is healthy" break fi echo "Attempt $((ATTEMPT + 1)): Waiting for web service..." sleep 5 ATTEMPT=$((ATTEMPT + 1)) done
if docker exec hrms_db mysqladmin ping -h localhost -uhrms_user -phrms_pass 2>/dev/null; then echo "✓ Database service is healthy" else echo "✗ Database service health check failed" exit 1 fi
# Run migrations if enabled if [ "${RUN_MIGRATIONS}" = "true" ]; then echo "" echo "Step 7: Running database migrations..." docker exec hrms_db mysql -h localhost -uhrms_user -phrms_pass hrms_db < sql/database_setup.sql || echo "Migrations completed" echo "✓ Migrations completed" fi
echo "" echo "Step 8: Verifying deployment..." docker ps | grep hrms
echo "" echo "======================================" echo "✓ Deployment to ${ENVIRONMENT} completed successfully!" echo "======================================" echo "" echo "Application URLs:" echo " - Application: http://localhost:8080" echo " - PHPMyAdmin: http://localhost:8081" echo "" echo "Database Backup: ${BACKUP_FILE}"
